response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in hardware design, SoC/IP modeling, deep-learning workload optimization, or GPU architecture—core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. While Bogdan has strong software engineering and optimization experience, his background is in web/mobile development, embedded systems, and general software architecture, which does not align closely with AI accelerator hardware or low-level performance tuning for AI workloads.
strengths: Strong software engineering and optimization experience in diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Proven ability to work with high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time data processing)
Experience with system architecture and hardware-software co-design in limited contexts (robotic arms, real-time note-taking tools)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architectures, or deep-learning workload optimization
Lacks required qualifications in hardware-focused domains (e.g., PhD/Master's in relevant engineering/CS field with hardware experience)
Background is heavily skewed toward software development rather than hardware or performance architecture for AI accelerators

key_factors.factor: System architecture design for AI accelerators
